disclaimer.title: Legal Notice
disclaimer.lead_short: Next59 is not a betting platform. We do not promote betting culture.

manifesto.p1: Under no circumstances and in no form do we promote betting or gambling culture. Even when presented under the label of "entertainment," we know this field carries serious risks—both financial and emotional—for the people involved. For that reason, we do not engage with any betting company through advertising, partnership, or indirect arrangements—and we never will. This is not merely a preference; it is the foundation of our editorial independence.
manifesto.p2_lead: Our purpose is something else entirely.
manifesto.p2: We want to offer a new way of understanding the excitement of football—through the power of data, not human intuition. Without supporting a team, without being attached to an outcome, without belonging to any side… only by focusing on the game itself.
manifesto.p3: Next59 is not a prediction platform. It is an AI journalism initiative.
manifesto.p4: Before kickoff, we use historical data, form analysis, statistical models, and mathematical frameworks to understand the possible flow of the match. Our aim is not to give a "definite outcome," but to forecast the scenarios that may unfold across 90 minutes—as honestly and transparently as possible.
manifesto.p5_lead: Because to us, football is not merely a score. It is a story.
manifesto.p5: And we tell that story with data.
